author: Antigravity Research Director

statistical_significance.warning: Standard t-statistics are heavily inflated by autocorrelation from overlapping returns. After Newey-West correction (lag = H), significance at 30d+ horizons vanishes.

regime_stability.strengths: Strongest and most reliable in Bull Markets and Low-Volatility regimes (quick spike-and-crash).
regime_stability.weaknesses: Breaks down during major systemic crises (e.g. 2008 Lehman, 2020 COVID) where VIX clusters and stays persistently high for months, causing massive losses for early mean-reversion entries.

friction_impact.short_vix_degradation: Direct VIX replication or short volatility product trading (VXX/UVXY) is heavily degraded by transaction costs, slippage, and high borrowing fees (annualized borrow rate modeled at 5%).
friction_impact.preferred_implementation: Long SPY post-VIX spike avoids borrowing cost friction and roll yields while capturing the equity market recovery.

optimized_parameters.strategy: Long SPY on VIX Level Spike
optimized_parameters.signal_definition: VIX Level Z-Score > 3.0 (using rolling 252-day lookback for mean and std deviation)
optimized_parameters.overlap_treatment: Treatment D (10-day cooldown period after signal to prevent cluster risk)

Short SPY (Control).parameters: Threshold: Z3, H: 10, Treatment: B (Active Hold)

machine_learning_conclusions.model_suitability: Conditioned regressor models (trained only on spike days) show moderate out-of-sample predictive power for decay magnitude.
machine_learning_conclusions.interpretation: VIX level and VIX z-score are positive predictors of reversion magnitude (higher spikes revert faster in percentage terms). SPY drawdown (SPY_DD) is a negative predictor (spikes accompanied by massive equity drops revert slower).

warnings_for_future_agents: DO NOT use standard t-statistics for overlapping forward returns. Always apply Newey-West standard error correction.
DO NOT assume zero transaction costs or zero borrow rates for shorting volatility index proxies. A 5%+ borrow rate is mandatory for realistic simulations.
DO NOT optimize parameters on out-of-sample data. Walk-forward testing shows that optimal parameters change over time and overfitting can occur.
Acknowledge the Nikkei/VIX spike of Aug 2024: entering SPY long immediately on a VIX spike before the true crash bottom occurred led to immediate drawdowns in the OOS demo.
